title: vCon - Unsigned Form
description: JSON schema for the unsigned form of vCon (Conversational Data Container) as defined in draft-ietf-vcon-vcon-core-02

vcon.description: Syntactic version of the JSON format. For this document, must be '0.4.0'

uuid.description: Globally unique identifier for the vCon. SHOULD be a version 8 UUID

subject.description: Subject or topic of the conversation

created_at.description: Creation time of this vCon in RFC3339 format

updated_at.description: Last modified time of this vCon in RFC3339 format

extensions.description: List of names of all vCon extensions used by this vCon

critical.description: List of extension names that a consumer MUST support to safely process this vCon

redacted.description: Reference to the unredacted or less redacted prior vCon instance. Object form requires 'type' plus one of the vCon reference forms (uuid, inline, or url+content_hash). May also be an empty object.

amended.description: Reference to the prior vCon instance version that this vCon amends. One of the vCon reference forms (uuid, inline, or url+content_hash). May also be an empty object.

group.description: Array of vCon references that this vCon aggregates

parties.description: Array of Party Objects representing all parties involved in the conversation

dialog.description: Array of Dialog Objects containing the captured conversation content

attachments.description: Array of Attachment Objects for ancillary documents related to the conversation

analysis.description: Array of Analysis Objects containing analysis performed on the conversational data

ContentHash.description: Content hash formatted as 'sha512-' followed by the base64url-encoded SHA-512 digest. May be a single string or an array of such strings.

VconReference.description: Reference to another vCon by uuid, inline content, or url + content_hash

Party.description: Represents a party involved in the conversation. All properties are optional; extensions MAY add further properties.

str.description: STIR PASSporT in JWS Compact Serialization form

validation.description: Label identifying the method of identity validation used

gmlpos.description: Geographic location in GML pos format (latitude longitude)

role.description: Role of the party in the conversation

Civicaddress.description: Civic address information for a party's location

Dialog.description: Represents a segment of captured conversation. The required fields depend on 'type'; see CDDL for the precise per-type shape.

start.description: Start time of the dialog in RFC3339 format

parties.description: Index/indices of parties in the parties array

mediatype.description: Media type of the dialog content

filename.description: Original filename of the dialog content

url.description: HTTPS URL for externally referenced content

campaign.description: Campaign identifier associated with the dialog

interaction.description: Interaction identifier associated with the dialog

disposition.description: Reason for incomplete dialog (required when type is 'incomplete')

transferee.description: Party index of the transferee (for transfer type)

transferor.description: Party index of the transferor (for transfer type)

transfer_target.description: Party index of the transfer target (for transfer type)

original.description: Dialog index of the original conversation (for transfer type)

consultation.description: Dialog index of the consultation (for transfer type)

target_dialog.description: Dialog index of the target dialog (for transfer type)

PartyHistory.description: Records a party event during the dialog

time.description: Time of the event in RFC3339 format

Attachment.description: Represents an ancillary document related to the conversation

purpose.description: Text description of what the attachment is for

start.description: Time the attachment was sent/exchanged in RFC3339 format

party.description: Index of the party that contributed the attachment

dialog.description: Index of the dialog this attachment is part of

url.description: HTTPS URL for externally referenced attachment

Analysis.description: Represents analysis performed on the conversational data

type.description: Semantic type of analysis (e.g., transcript, summary, sentiment, translation, tts)

dialog.description: Index or array of indices of dialog objects this analysis is based on

mediatype.description: Media type of the analysis file

filename.description: Original filename of the analysis data

product.description: Product name to differentiate from other vendor products

schema.description: Token, label, or URL identifying the data format/schema of the analysis body

url.description: HTTPS URL for externally referenced analysis
